title: Panasonic Dream DVD promo video
wikitext:
[]: Panasonic Dream DVD promo video             Quote Post by svenge » Sat Oct 24, 2015 4:47 am I was poking around my copy of Volume 1 of the Japanese pre-Renewal DVDs ( KIBA-1 ) to try and do screenshots of the menu's info screens, when I found a 1:15 video embedded in the VIDEO_TS.VOB file. The thing is that normally said file should only contain the menu screens as individual frames, along with the Gainax logo animation that auto-plays when the disc is first inserted. But oddly enough, there is absolutely no way to access this hidden video using the menus! Anyhow, here's a LINK to it on YouTube, and a transcription (plus crappy Google Translate "translation") of the telop slates therein: ***************************************** ガイナックスと パナソニックが贈る デジタル補完計画 エヴァンゲリオンが DVDの デジタル高画質で 再起動 Gainax and Panasonic present to you a Digital Instrumentality Project ------------------------------- MPEG2圧縮動き予想可変転送レート MPEG2 motion-adaptive compression with variable bit-rate ------------------------------- 片面二層構造拾弐センチディスク壱枚四話収録 Single-sided dual-layer 12-centimeter disc with four episodes each ------------------------------- デジタル大容量の歓喜各逸話を網羅するデータベース Digital high-capacity database containing the delight of each story ------------------------------- そして DVDの能力を引き出すプレーヤー And the player that brings out the abilities of DVD ------------------------------- パナソニック Dream Panasonic Dream

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 24, 2015 11:37 am What a cool find! I wonder why it can't be accessible through the menu...Could that have been a mistake on their end?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 24, 2015 11:39 am So the hunt begins for other Easter Eggs...

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Oct 25, 2015 8:37 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: What a cool find! I wonder why it can't be accessible through the menu...Could that have been a mistake on their end?

Article: Panasonic Dream DVD promo video
[]: Panasonic Dream DVD promo video             Quote Post by svenge » Sat Oct 24, 2015 4:47 am I was poking around my copy of Volume 1 of the Japanese pre-Renewal DVDs ( KIBA-1 ) to try and do screenshots of the menu's info screens, when I found a 1:15 video embedded in the VIDEO_TS.VOB file. The thing is that normally said file should only contain the menu screens as individual frames, along with the Gainax logo animation that auto-plays when the disc is first inserted. But oddly enough, there is absolutely no way to access this hidden video using the menus! Anyhow, here's a LINK to it on YouTube, and a transcription (plus crappy Google Translate "translation") of the telop slates therein: ***************************************** ガイナックスと パナソニックが贈る デジタル補完計画 エヴァンゲリオンが DVDの デジタル高画質で 再起動 Gainax and Panasonic present to you a Digital Instrumentality Project ------------------------------- MPEG2圧縮動き予想可変転送レート MPEG2 motion-adaptive compression with variable bit-rate ------------------------------- 片面二層構造拾弐センチディスク壱枚四話収録 Single-sided dual-layer 12-centimeter disc with four episodes each ------------------------------- デジタル大容量の歓喜各逸話を網羅するデータベース Digital high-capacity database containing the delight of each story ------------------------------- そして DVDの能力を引き出すプレーヤー And the player that brings out the abilities of DVD ------------------------------- パナソニック Dream Panasonic Dream
